author: chetachiezikeuzor
description: A status bar menu allowing you to quickly toggle snippets on and off.

manifest.author: chetachi
manifest.description: MySnippets is a plugin that adds a status bar menu allowing the user to quickly toggle their snippets on and off 🖌.
manifest.name: MySnippets

name: MySnippets

releases.author: chetachiezikeuzor
releases.description:
This is the initial release of MySnippets plugin. Primary functionality includes:
- Open snippets folder
- Reload snippets folder
- Open snippet in app
- Set default app

![MySnippets v1 0 0](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/79069364/144685067-ea071dc3-c6f3-489b-90f7-e4f8f394d181.png)
releases.name: MySnippets 1.0.0
